Impact energy of particles in ball mills can be predicted using DEM simulations combined with data-driven approach.
An improved method for grinding mill filling measurement enables accurate estimation of load volume and mass.
Milling force can be predicted using transfer learning and neural networks.
Particle flow characteristics in a drum can be predicted using synthetic acoustic signals and ANN.
Wet mill load parameters can be analyzed using multiple channel mechanical signals under multiple grinding conditions.
Manufacturing process monitoring is feasible using time-frequency representation and transfer learning of deep neural networks.
